crossref.abstract: <jats:p>Using ai-GCMC simulations, <jats:italic>operando</jats:italic> WAXS, and kinetics analysis, we found that the high-rate performance of Sb as an alloy anode in Na-ion batteries is due to the presence of an amorphous intermediate phase formed during sodiation and desodiation.</jats:p>
title: Understanding the fast kinetics and mechanism of sodium storage in antimony using ab initio grand canonical Monte Carlo simulation and operando X-ray scattering
